blocker: Cannot auto-execute outreach: sending emails/DMs and signing data-use agreements are human/legal actions, so the 10+ real incidents are enabled but not yet obtained.
one_line: Built and validated the full first-party incident-sourcing pipeline (16-target list, 4 outreach templates, JSON-Schema intake mapping 1:1 to specs/real, consent+DUA checklist, tracking CSV, passing validator) plus one worked donated example.
